question: How much of the Pantanal wetland in Brazil was burned by wildfires in 2024?
ground_truth: Wildfires burned 760,000 hectares (1.8 million acres) of the Pantanal in 2024, destroying over 4% of Brazil's largest wetland.
event_desc: 9 July  2024 Brazil wildfires Wildfires burn 760,000 hectares (1.8 million acres) of the Pantanal, destroying over 4% of Brazil's largest wetland.
